toolCallSchema.routeRule: route must be a root-relative existing AfroTools route
toolCallSchema.privacyRule: do not include raw user prompts, private documents, emails, phone numbers, secrets, or sensitive financial/career text in tool-call arguments

recommendedFlow: rank the full catalog with assets/js/ai/tool-manifest.js rankToolCandidates
send only the top candidate chunk or shortlisted tool calls to the provider
validate provider-selected tool ids against this catalog before launch
retrievalPolicy.fallback: use deterministic routing and /search/ when no candidate passes score thresholds
